$comment: Selector registry for packing-list. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. Anchors target the seeded 'Greece' trip (src/qa/fixtures.ts), pre-loaded with packers so the shared-packing screen needs no live typing. text = Maestro regex; 'Greece.*' is anchored because the row shows 'Greece · 4 days'.

packer-sam.note: a seeded packer Pill (src/qa/fixtures.ts) — outcome anchor for the add-packer action. Wrapped in .* because the packers row is one merged a11y element ('Me, Sam, Maya') on iOS (Pressable children collapse into the parent label); Maestro full-matches the regex, so bare 'Sam' never matched a screen where Sam is plainly visible.

trip-info-title.note: Static header on TripInfoScreen, inside its keyboardShouldPersistTaps="handled" ScrollView. Tapped to dismiss the auto-raised name-input keyboard before the trip-type buttons — replaces a hideKeyboard step that is flaky on iOS (no standard dismiss action). Cross-platform deterministic.

add-item-input.note: the sticky add-item TextInput on TripDetail (i18n detail.newItemA11y). A real RN TextInput, so it's in the a11y tree on both platforms — tap to focus, type, return-key (onSubmitEditing) adds. Used by the T4 survival flow.

survival-item.note: T4 survival marker — an item name absent from the beach-trip auto-list, so assertNot holds before the add and assert can only pass if the write persisted. Wrapped in .* for the iOS merged item-row a11y label.
